description_long: This dirt bike features a streamlined, sporty design with a predominantly red body accented by black and metallic components. The frame is lightweight yet robust, supporting a single elongated seat and a high-mounted front fender for off-road capability. The wheels are equipped with knobby tires and cross-laced spokes, ideal for traction on varied terrain. The handlebars are straight with a slight rise, fitted with standard controls and a single rearview mirror on the left. The engine and exhaust system are exposed, with the exhaust pipe running along the right side in a high-mounted configuration. The overall build suggests durability and agility, suitable for both urban and rugged environments.
description: A red, sporty dirt bike with knobby tires, cross-laced spokes, and a high-mounted exhaust, designed for agility and durability. Features include a single elongated seat, straight handlebars, and exposed engine components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headlight, handlebars with controls, and a single rearview mirror on the left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red body, cross-laced wheels, engine, and the elongated seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the narrow seat, rear fender, and the alignment of the wheels and handlebars.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the high-mounted exhaust, engine, and the overall streamlined profile.
